info.title: Harness NextGen Software Delivery Platform API Reference
info.description: This is the Open Api Spec 3 for the Platform Service. This is under active development. Beware of the breaking change with respect to the generated code stub.

tags.name: Account Resource Groups
tags.description: This contains APIs for performing CRUD operations on Account level Resource Groups.

tags.name: Organization Resource Groups
tags.description: This contains APIs for performing CRUD operations on Organization level Resource Groups.

tags.name: Project Resource Groups
tags.description: This contains APIs for performing CRUD operations on Project level Resource Groups.

get.description: Returns a list of Resource Groups present in the Account scope.

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization methods other than the x-api-key header. If you are using the x-api-key header, this can be skipped.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination page number strategy: Specify the page number within the paginated collection related to the number of items on each page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Pagination: Number of items to return.

parameters.name: search_term
parameters.description: This would be used to filter resources having attributes matching the search term.

Link.description: Links to related resources, in the format defined by [RFC 5988](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988#section-5). This will include a link with relation type `next` to the next page, if there is a next page.

value.name: Example_Resource Group
value.description: This is an Example Resource Group

color.description: Color associated with the Resource Group.

allowed_scope_levels.description: List of allowed scope levels for this Resource Group.

included_scope.description: Scopes included in the Resource Group.

resource_filter.description: Contains Resource filter for a Resource Group.

include_all.description: Boolean value for including all resources in Resource Group.

harness_managed.description: This indicates if this Resource Group is managed by Harness or not. If true, Harness can manage and modify this Resource Group.

updated.description: Last modification timestamp for Resource Group.
